name: Heilongjiang Tobacco | openEuler
description: Heilongjiang Tobacco Industry Co. Ltd. deployed the NeoKylin security-enhanced mail system V6.0 on ARM-based Inspur Yingxin servers running Galaxy Kylin Advanced Server Operating System V10, filtering junk and infected mail for over 7,000 users.

headline: Heilongjiang Tobacco Security Mail System Project
description: Heilongjiang Tobacco Industry Co. Ltd. deployed the NeoKylin security-enhanced mail system V6.0 on ARM-based servers to filter junk and infected mail, serving over 7,000 users and setting an industry benchmark in Heilongjiang.

about.name: NeoKylin Security-Enhanced Mail System
about.description: NeoKylin security-enhanced mail system V6.0 deployed on ARM-based Inspur Yingxin servers running Galaxy Kylin Advanced Server Operating System V10 to filter junk and infected mail for Heilongjiang Tobacco.

articleBody: To filter out junk and infected mail and thereby improve the security and stability of the mail system, Heilongjiang Tobacco Industry Co. Ltd. deployed the NeoKylin security-enhanced mail system V6.0 on servers to transmit mail through mail webs and clients, and meet mail transmission and storage requirements. The solution uses an ARM (FT-2000+/64) processor on an Inspur Yingxin server running Galaxy Kylin Advanced Server Operating System V10. The successful implementation set a precedent for the deployment of security mail systems in Heilongjiang, with the number of mail system users surpassing 7,000. The NeoKylin security-enhanced mail system uses a proxy to isolate the intranet zone from other zones, ensuring that mail is highly secure.
